changelog:
Talken 2.1

✨ New:
- Talken now runs quietly in the background — stay online and keep getting messages and notifications even with the window closed.
- Start Talken automatically when Windows starts, and jump straight to your chats — no login screen.
- Right-click the tray icon any time to open Talken or quit it fully.

🔒 Privacy:
- Each account's data is now stored separately and privately on your device.

🔧 Improvements:
- Faster, no-flash startup that signs you in automatically.
- Smoother, more reliable connectivity.

📝 Notes:
Thanks for using Talken!
